# ECO-ROD LTD

> ECO-ROD LTD is a professional drainage services company based in Nottingham, England. We provide 24/7 emergency drain unblocking, drain cleaning, CCTV drain surveys, high-pressure jetting, drain repair and installation, drain tracing and locating, drain rodent trap installation, drainage surveys and reports, toilet unblocking, and commercial pressure washing. We serve domestic, commercial, and industrial clients across Nottingham, Derby, Leicester, Nottinghamshire, Derbyshire, and Leicestershire.

## Business Information

- **Company name:** ECO-ROD LTD
- **Industry:** Drainage services / plumbing
- **Location:** Nottingham, Nottinghamshire, England, NG6 0FQ
- **Service area:** Nottingham, Derby, Leicester, Nottinghamshire, Derbyshire, Leicestershire, and surrounding towns including Eastwood, Kimberley, Hucknall, Stapleford, Chilwell, Ilkeston, Long Eaton, Beeston, West Bridgford, Arnold, Mansfield, Loughborough, Chesterfield, and many more
- **Phone:** +44 115 837 1711
- **Email:** info@eco-rodltd.com
- **Website:** https://www.eco-rodltd.com
- **Availability:** 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year — including bank holidays
- **Accreditations:** SMAS Worksafe accredited

## Services

- [Drain Unblocking](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/drain-unblocking): Emergency and planned drain unblocking for domestic, commercial, and industrial properties across Nottingham and the East Midlands. Fast response, modern equipment, minimal disruption.
- [Drain Cleaning](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/drain-cleaning): Professional drain cleaning using high-pressure water jetting to remove debris, grease, sludge, and scale from drainage systems. Prevents future blockages and foul odours.
- [High Pressure Jetting](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/high-pressure-jetting): Advanced high-pressure water jetting to clear severe blockages, root ingress, and build-up in drainage pipes. Effective for domestic, commercial, and industrial drains.
- [CCTV Drain Survey](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/cctv-drain-survey): Camera-based inspection of drainage systems to identify blockages, cracks, root intrusion, and structural defects. Detailed video footage and condition report provided.
- [Drainage Surveys & Reports](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/drainage-surveys-and-reports): Comprehensive drainage assessments with detailed written reports and expert recommendations. Suitable for pre-purchase surveys, insurance claims, and compliance requirements.
- [Drain Repair & Installation Services](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/drain-repair-and-installation-services): Full drain repair and new drainage installation services including pipe relining, patch repairs, and complete system installations for all property types.
- [Drain Tracing & Locating](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/drain-tracing-and-locating): Specialist drain tracing to accurately map underground drainage routes and locate hidden or collapsed pipes without unnecessary excavation.
- [Drain Rodent Trap Installation](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/drain-rodent-trap-installation): Professional installation of in-drain rodent traps to prevent rats and mice from entering properties through the drainage system. Discreet, effective, and humane.
- [Toilet Unblocking](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/toilet-unblocking): Fast toilet unblocking for homes, offices, restaurants, and commercial premises. Available 24/7 for emergency call-outs.
- [Commercial Pressure Washing](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/services/commercial-pressure-washing): High-powered jet washing for commercial and industrial exterior surfaces including car parks, driveways, patios, building facades, and industrial floors.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://www.eco-rodltd.com): Overview of ECO-ROD LTD, all drainage services, client testimonials, gallery, and contact form.
- [About Us](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/#about): Background on ECO-ROD LTD, our experience, values, and commitment to reliable drainage services across the East Midlands.
- [Testimonials](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/#reviews): Verified 5-star Google reviews from domestic and commercial customers across Nottingham, Derby, and Leicester.
- [Gallery](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/#gallery): Before-and-after photos of drain cleaning, unblocking, and jetting work carried out by ECO-ROD LTD engineers.
- [Contact](https://www.eco-rodltd.com/#contact): Contact form, telephone number (+44 115 837 1711), and email (info@eco-rodltd.com) for bookings and enquiries.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Do you offer 24/7 emergency drainage services?**
Yes. ECO-ROD LTD is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for emergency drain unblocking, toilet unblocking, and other urgent drainage issues throughout Nottingham, Derby, Leicester, and the surrounding East Midlands region.

**What areas do you cover?**
We cover Nottingham, Derby, Leicester, and a wide range of surrounding towns and villages across Nottinghamshire, Derbyshire, and Leicestershire — including Eastwood, Hucknall, Kimberley, Beeston, West Bridgford, Arnold, Ilkeston, Long Eaton, Mansfield, Loughborough, and Chesterfield.

**Do you work with commercial clients?**
Yes. ECO-ROD LTD works with domestic homeowners, commercial businesses (restaurants, offices, retail), housing authorities, and industrial clients. We offer one-off jobs and regular maintenance contracts.

**What accreditations do you hold?**
ECO-ROD LTD is SMAS Worksafe accredited, demonstrating compliance with health and safety standards for contractor work.

**How can I book a drainage engineer?**
Call us on 0115 837 1711 (available 24/7), email info@eco-rodltd.com, or complete the contact form at https://www.eco-rodltd.com/#contact.

**Do you provide CCTV drain survey reports?**
Yes. Our CCTV drain surveys include full video footage of the drainage system and a written condition report with recommendations — suitable for pre-purchase property surveys, insurance purposes, and planned maintenance.

## About This File

This file follows the llms.txt specification (https://llmstxt.org) to help AI language models accurately represent ECO-ROD LTD's services, location, and contact information in AI-generated responses and summaries.
